839.description: Extended Analog Input 1 IO element is used to measure Analog Input 1 voltage, when Analog Input 1 voltage is > 65 V.

840.name: Extended Analog Input 2
840.description: Extended Analog Input 2 IO element is used to measure Analog Input 2 voltage, when Analog Input 1 voltage is > 65 V.

841.name: DOUT 1 Overcurrent
841.description: DOUT 1 Overcurrent IO element is used to indicate overcurrent on Digital Output 1. When Digital Output 1 overcurrent happens, it means that current level is > 300 mA, value is set to 1. Value 1 holds

842.name: DOUT2 Overcurrent
842.description: DOUT 2 Overcurrent IO element is used to indicate overcurrent on Digital Output 2. When Digital Output 2 overcurrent happens, it means that current level is > 300 mA, value is set to 1. Value 1 holds
